Alice, from Wales, tries to sell a moulded model advertisement for mens underwear from the early 20th century. Naz from Halifax presents a harmonica that she wants to sell so she and her young son can have a holiday, and Sharon from Hellsby tries to interest the dealers in a Victorian silver belt. Nigel Havers presents

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David and the team appraise curios and collectibles brought along by the public in Llandudno, North Wales, where the biggest and best deal of the day is struck by Mike Melody, who buys a pair of gold watches

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Birmingham couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Amanda and her husband Anthony kick off the competition with an ambitious menu, before its the turn of festival lover Oli and his girlfriend LC, who prepare a vegetarian menu for their guests. However, their evening is tainted by Anthony, who upsets several of the guests with an untoward remark. Civil partners Steve and Sean try to put the weeks tension behind them as they focus on winning the cash prize

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect explores an arts and crafts-inspired house in Surrey. Built in the 1920s, it has tall chimneys, leaded windows, gabled ends and a steeply pitched roof. Sadly, it has Artex everywhere and incorporates some dubious design alterations. He sets out to help its owners turn it back into an elegant home for themselves and their three children. George also tackles a suburban home that has so many layers of wallpaper that peeling them back is like going back through a time warp

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from previous series. High up on Dartmoor, shepherds Steve and Crispin Alford ride their horses out to gather their sheep for a speed shearing competition. In Looe, on the south coast of Cornwall, the whole community is gearing up for one of the biggest events of the year - the one-mile wild swim from St Georges Island back to the town beach

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tornado hits Springfield and Marge and Homer have a brush with death that prompts them to think about who would look after their kids if the worst were to happen. But finding suitable guardians for their brood is no easy feat - until they bump into super-cool couple Mav and Portia. Hes a surfer and shes an environmental lawyer - but are they just too good to be true?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. As usual, its left to Marge to talk some sense into her hubby. Featuring the guest voice of music legend Tom Waits

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The couple decide to be charitable and donate funds to Deacons school library - but Carrie is more concerned with looking generous than actually helping people. Leah Remini stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon take $100 from the emergency fund to place a bet on a boxing match. But when they win $5,000, they have to spend it all in one day to stop Carrie finding out about the theft. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug discovers Carrie used to have a crush on his dentist - who he is convinced is deliberately making his root canal operation as painful as possible. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Robert both want to keep a stray bulldog that Ray brings home. It reminds Ray of a dog he had to give up as a child, but it turns out that the cute canine is not so stray after all. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The neighbours are upset by the antics of Rays parents and gather at his house to thrash out a solution, but their meeting is gatecrashed by the troublesome pair

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A psychotherapist arrives to interview Debra for a book on the American family, but finds the rest of the household far more captivating, leaving the humble housewife feeling left out

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink celebrates his 2,000th radio broadcast and is disappointed to find he has a recording of every show but one, forcing him to turn to an obsessive fan for a copy of the elusive tape. Guest starring computer tycoon Bill Gates

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier befriend Kirby, whose girlfriends grandfather is a well-known wine connoisseur. Martin is forced to wear a device to monitor his blood pressure. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Felicity Montagu, Fra Fee, Francis Bourgeois, and Leigh and Jill Francis. With music by Jordan Rakei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A dare lands Bart in hospital and he makes up a story that he went to Heaven and met Jesus, prompting Christian film producers to offer the Simpsons a movie deal

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Barts dream girl Mary Spuckler comes to town, but their relationship turns sour when he fails to pay her enough attention. Meanwhile, Homer lands himself in the doghouse after upsetting Marge once too often. With the guest voices of Benedict Cumberbatch and Zooey Deschanel

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse sample the perks of adulthood when a shaving experiment leaves one of the boys looking exactly like his father. Meanwhile, a preoccupied Marge tries to protect Maggie from the dangers of childrens TV

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Circus Wagon, Tree Hotel and Camping Pod
programme.desc: The architect meets master craftsman Paul, who has muscular dystrophy and is saving a Victorian circus wagon. George also finds out about a grain store being re-imagined as a festival bar, discovers a small hotel disguised as a tree and a camping pod that looks like a giant conker

programme.title: Hamleys: Top 100 Toys of All Time
programme.desc: A celebration of the greatest toys of all time, as Jonathan Ross and daughter Honey, Alison Hammond and son Aidan and comedians and best friends Lou Sanders and Harriet Kemsley are given after-hours permission to run wild in the world-famous Hamleys toy shop on Regent Street to get their hands on the playthings they loved and longed for as children. The list features everything from Lego and Hungry Hippos to the pogo stick, Operation and the infamous clackers

programme.title: Soul (2020)
programme.desc: Joe Gardner is a middle school music teacher in New York City, who fervently believes that music is life. He auditions to play piano at a popular jazz club as part of a quartet led by Dorothea Williams. On his way home from impressing Dorothea, Joe tumbles down an open manhole and lingers in limbo between life and death. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jamie Foxx and Tina Fey

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Inside Legoland: Brick by Brick
programme.desc: Behind the scenes as one of the UKs busiest theme parks, meeting the army of designers, engineers and entertainers are working flat out to keep customers happy. From building a new entrance portal to rehearsing a high-octane stunt show just days before opening, the pressure is on. Add in intricate model making, ride upgrades and even feeding sharks, and its all hands on deck

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond presents the show giving people the chance to perform the one song that tells their story - often in front of a crowd for the very first time. Mentors Paloma Faith and Sam Ryder watch and listen to the performances. In the first episode, Alison heads to Liverpool, where a teenager sings Bocelli for the foster mum he cant find words to thank, and a kidney transplant recipient brings Sam and Paloma sprinting out into the downpour. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More hopefuls enter the restaurant looking to find the perfect match. Twenty-seven-year-old yoga instructor Nicole meets Matthew, a 24-year-old mindfulness coach. While they seem like the perfect combination for love, how will Nicole, whos only ever dated older men, react to finding out that Matthew is younger than her?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the weeks biggest and best shows

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willys Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A dare lands Bart in hospital and he makes up a story that he went to Heaven and met Jesus, prompting Christian film producers to offer the Simpsons a movie deal

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse sample the perks of adulthood when a shaving experiment leaves one of the boys looking exactly like his father. Meanwhile, a preoccupied Marge tries to protect Maggie from the dangers of childrens TV

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Wirral on Merseyside compete, beginning with Sandra and her husband Graham who met in the Army more than 17 years earlier. Second to host are travel agent Joanne and her partner Simon who plan to keep their evening uncomplicated, before housewife Helen and banking manager Adam reveal there is more to them than meets the eye

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George heads to Kent to help Pete and Amelie make their huge 16 room Victorian house fit for modern life, with plans to make a playroom and a library. Amelie makes a trip to Shropshire to make her own encaustic tiles in one of the last remaining factories in the country to use traditional methods. Plus, George revisits Michele in Warwickshire to see how she is getting on remodelling her adjoining Grade II listed cottages

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane grow tired of Coach hanging around them all the time, so they set him up on a date. Starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliffs pedantic know-it-all attitude finally gets him into trouble with another patron and it is not long before his bravery is called into question. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and John Ratzenberger

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach acquires an antique weighing machine that also gives out fortunes - which start coming true in eerie fashion - but Diane brushes off the predictions as coincidence, until she is forced to revise her opinion

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones reminisce about more peaceful times in their first apartment and recall why they ended up living across the road from Rays meddlesome parents

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Rays relatives reluctantly tell him the brutal truth about his performance as a panellist on Roy Firestones live TV sports show. American comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray attends classes to learn a range of parenting skills, hoping they will help him be a better father to Ally and the twins - but ends up using them to keep Frank and Marie in line. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrinks agent Bebe puts her lowly assistant in charge of his career when a popular new radio psychiatrist appears on the scene. Meanwhile, Martin seems unwilling to make a doctors appointment. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz tries everyones patience by talking incessantly about her new love Roger, and Frasier offers to help protect Martin from a bullying boss. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Peace and harmony are shattered by the arrival of Daphnes conniving mother and lecherous brother, and Frasier finds himself forced into playing host. Comedy, guest starring Anthony LaPaglia and Millicent Martin, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. The shrink is unable to stand any more of Daphnes lecherous brother Simon and throws him out, leaving her alone to deal with her conniving mother. Comedy, guest starring Anthony LaPaglia and Millicent Martin, with Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. Their relationship is so fractured that theyre failing to save their fathers Italian restaurant Levantis from being overwhelmed by local competition, and the situation has become so desperate that their dad is in danger of losing his life savings

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the Chiltern Hills in Buckinghamshire to meet Adam and Mandy, who run a classic car restoration business. Henry uncovers an anvil, while Simon finds an old brown dresser, which he thinks could become a wildlife sanctuary for birds and insects

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers enjoy a trip around Durham Cathedral. Matt visits a nearby quarry to help blast stone used to refurbish the cathedral itself before braving the freezing waters of the River Wear for an underwater treasure hunt. Bird enthusiast Mike gets up close and personal with the owls in the cloisters and meets the craftspeople lovingly conserving the building, while Janice helps to create one of the cathedrals new tapestries

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman jets off to the countryside of Murcia in Spain to help Debra from London, and Greg from Memphis in the USA. The couple are veterans of the West End and Broadway and are looking for a holiday home in the sun which one day may become their permanent home for them and their beloved dog, Trinity. Jasmine shows them five options for their budget of £150,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with Adam and Alicia at their busy cocktail bar on the Costa del Sol, to discover if they have become victims of their own success. Coach tour operator Lesley trials new Spanish culinary experiences to get her business back on the road, and in France, Colin and Kim are finishing up an ambitious gîte renovation

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Kathryn and Steve battle to revive their 14th-century kitchen without losing the buildings sense of history, while Sarah and George face their first wedding of the season

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With just a month left to renovate the Spanish villa, Jasmine speeds up the build by taking a sledgehammer to the old kitchen walls. A family barbecue on the beach eases the stress, but not for long as theres a problem with the new lounge windows

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: The kennel takes a shot on Bulut, a wary stray Malinois who showed up in the middle of the night. Bailey the cocker spaniel faces the challenge of living up to expectations, while for Moose the staffy, its a chance at second-time luck

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Cold Case Murder
programme.desc: Part one of two. The inside story of the cold case investigation into the murder of an 86-year-old who was stabbed multiple times in 2013, before her body was set on fire. More than a decade later, detectives from the Major Crime Unit decide to reopen the investigation hoping that advances in DNA science will mean they can finally identify the killer

programme.title: The Disappearance of Jay Slater
programme.desc: Insight into the case of a British teenager who disappeared in Tenerife in the summer of 2024, and how mass online interest set conspiracy theories flying, causing a social media storm led by true-crime keyboard detectives. Featuring never-before-seen CCTV footage, previously unheard audio, the discovery of unsent messages, and access to the Slater family as they search for answers. This documentary is the only media in the world granted full access to the post-mortem, funeral and inquest

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: When the mission to capture their enemy in Paris goes sideways, Alexander surprises the Orphanage by going off-book and following his own plan. But this time, it could cost him everything. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: French Roulette
programme.desc: French mystery, starring Michèle Laroque as a casino manager investigating her daughters disappearance in 1970s Nice, while also facing ruthless competition, poor lower-level management, and Mafia-backed cheats at the roulette table. In French

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three sets of contestants from Brighton compete, beginning with Sam and Nick, who produce a simple menu that reflects their busy lives running two businesses and looking after four children. The second couple are Maria and Terry, who offer an Asian-themed meal and an evenings entertainment of writing love poems. Last to host are Dave and his perfectionist girlfriend Sarah, who try to provide a fun-fuelled night full of quality ingredients

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.sub-title: Click to Kill: The AI War Machine
programme.desc: With unique access in Ukraine, with the US army, and from within Israel, Dispatches charts the new technological arms race and asks whether these tools will make warfare more precise and reduce civilian casualties; or will they lead to more wars that are ever more brutal?

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Reporter Anja Popp is in Nigeria, home to one of the worlds most prolific film industries, to meet the women risking their livelihoods and reputations to push boundaries on screen

programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts go head to head as they create iced ombre cakes, and Mark-Francis Vandelli and Aggie MacKenzie battle it out with intricate jelly art

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus

Diane puts on a brave face for her family as she begins chemotherapy, but back at home, Tony is pushed to his limits. Also, sparks fly for two villagers and suspicion arises when a resident disappears

programme.title: Frasier

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits the allegedly haunted Cambridge Hotel in New York, run by former military man John Imhof and his wife Tina. John runs the business like a dictatorship - an approach that is upsetting staff and sending guests straight for the exits. Will the chef be able to use his experience in the restaurant business to save this struggling establishment from disaster?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Birmingham couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Amanda and her husband Anthony kick off the competition with an ambitious menu, before its the turn of festival lover Oli and his girlfriend LC, who prepare a vegetarian menu for their guests. However, their evening is tainted by Anthony, who upsets several of the guests with an untoward remark. Civil partners Steve and Sean try to put the weeks tension behind them as they focus on winning the cash prize

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect explores an arts and crafts-inspired house in Surrey. Built in the 1920s, it has tall chimneys, leaded windows, gabled ends and a steeply pitched roof. Sadly, it has Artex everywhere and incorporates some dubious design alterations. He sets out to help its owners turn it back into an elegant home for themselves and their three children. George also tackles a suburban home that has so many layers of wallpaper that peeling them back is like going back through a time warp

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: Compilation of highlights from previous series. High up on Dartmoor, shepherds Steve and Crispin Alford ride their horses out to gather their sheep for a speed shearing competition. In Looe, on the south coast of Cornwall, the whole community is gearing up for one of the biggest events of the year - the one-mile wild swim from St Georges Island back to the town beach

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tornado hits Springfield and Marge and Homer have a brush with death that prompts them to think about who would look after their kids if the worst were to happen. But finding suitable guardians for their brood is no easy feat - until they bump into super-cool couple Mav and Portia. Hes a surfer and shes an environmental lawyer - but are they just too good to be true?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: The couple decide to be charitable and donate funds to Deacons school library - but Carrie is more concerned with looking generous than actually helping people. Leah Remini stars

programme.desc: Doug and Deacon take $100 from the emergency fund to place a bet on a boxing match. But when they win $5,000, they have to spend it all in one day to stop Carrie finding out about the theft. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug discovers Carrie used to have a crush on his dentist - who he is convinced is deliberately making his root canal operation as painful as possible. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.desc: The neighbours are upset by the antics of Rays parents and gather at his house to thrash out a solution, but their meeting is gatecrashed by the troublesome pair

programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse sample the perks of adulthood when a shaving experiment leaves one of the boys looking exactly like his father. Meanwhile, a preoccupied Marge tries to protect Maggie from the dangers of childrens TV

programme.title: The Disappearance of Jay Slater
programme.desc: Insight into the case of a British teenager who disappeared in Tenerife in the summer of 2024, and how mass online interest set conspiracy theories flying, causing a social media storm led by true-crime keyboard detectives. programme.desc: Groom-to-be Steve from Rotherham, South Yorkshire, is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee the wedding of her dreams, while she relinquishes control of the big day. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.desc: Countryside-loving Richard plans an ambitious mountain-top wedding blessing hundreds of miles away in Wales for his home-loving bride-to-be Jody. But when even his best man Kane needs convincing that the idea is a good one, it seems the groom has an uphill battle on his hands

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Tennis fans John and Suzy bring the week to a close - can they serve up an ace menu and walk away with the prize?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. The proposition put forth by the Taskmaster, Greg Davies, and his efficient assistant, Alex Horne, may not seem like a hugely enticing one: come to a strange house near a golf course, attempt a range of unusual and apparently pointless tasks and then have your performance picked apart by an angry man sitting on an imposing throne. And yet the lure of claiming the fabled Taskmaster trophy has attracted five more comics who have been selected to participate in the fun and games. They are: Amy Gledhill, Armando Iannucci, Joanna Page, Joel Dommett and Kumail Nanjiani. Like so many before them, they all believe that they can impress the Taskmaster. But only one will be immortalised as the 21st Taskmaster champion.In this first episode, Amy Gledhill, Armando Iannucci, Joanna Page, Joel Dommett and Kumail Nanjiani go hunting for a small creature, serve Greg his fruit and veggies and attempt to catch a golden T-shirt. But who will find all the oranges?

programme.title: First Dates

His date is TV presenter Hayley, who may be confident on camera, but finds dating rather daunting. Next in is 72-year-old retired prison officer Sandie who, having modelled the first police-issue trousers for women, completed a Masters, and written a book, has lived a full life and wants to find someone to share an active retirement with. Her date is 79-year-old tennis coach Chris, who is also on the lookout for someone fit and active

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents restaurant, Sals Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after Johns mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. Little does she know her husband is planning a grand romantic gesture inspired by a special moment from their first year of marriage. But wires get crossed when the miffed housewife stumbles upon a dodgy website for couples bored of their partners, and she ends up chatting to the too-good-to-be-true Ben (voiced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane)

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The latest diners looking for love are retired labourer Ted, whos 69. He lost his wife Carol in 2013 after 40 years of marriage. He meets 67-year-old retired legal secretary Marian, whos been married four times but hasnt given up on love. Also dining are Fran, 47, who meets 46-year-old builder and part-time erotic thriller writer Colin. Plus, part-time model Linford, 25, meets 29-year-old advertising sales manager Xanthi from London, and coffee shop manager Oliver hopes for romance with personal assistant Loren

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Apprentice and Go Back to Where You Came From? Celebrity Special, Supermarket Own Brands: The Big Taste Test and a Channel 5 News report on the threat of an asteroid strike on Earth

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Gladiators, The White Lotus, The Apprentice, Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Fear Clinic: Face Your Phobia, Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less and Alan Titchmarshs Underdog to Superdog

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppis in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgias constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Its a familys worst nightmare when two children are taken, Charlie shares some good news with Vicky, and things come to a head in a face-off between two mothers. Diane puts on a brave face for her family as she begins chemotherapy, but back at home, Tony is pushed to his limits. Also, sparks fly for two villagers and suspicion arises when a resident disappears

programme.title: Wonder Park (2019)
programme.desc: June, a science-loving little girl, and her mother spend hours playing with stuffed animals and other toys, fashioning a world of imagination connected to a fabulous theme park. When Junes mom is diagnosed with a life-threatening illness and has to go away for treatment, June finds a real version of her theme park. Animated family adventure, with the voices of Mila Kunis, Jennifer Garner and Kenan Thompson

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Outside opinions and rising tensions are rife as Family and Friends Week continues. And new information comes to light that threatens the future of several couples

programme.desc: Two sea monsters fascinated with life above water disguise themselves as human boys so they can explore a town on the Italian Riviera. The duo strike up a friendship with a local girl, and risk their secret being exposed as they help her to compete in an annual sporting event. Pixar animated adventure, with the voices of Jacob Tremblay and Jack Dylan Grazer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krustys ancient jokes and politically incorrect impressions go down like a lead balloon at a charity comedy festival - so he decides to spice up his act by adding more alternative, adult-oriented material. Featuring the guest voice of chat show host Jay Leno, alongside comedians Steven Wright and Janeane Garofalo

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe desperately wants to raise cash to lavish on his new girlfriend, so Homer rashly agrees to help him defraud his car insurance company - but his bumbling attempts to destroy the vehicle put him behind bars. Featuring the guest voice of Helen Hunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apu has the bright idea of turning the Kwik-E-Mart into a novel money-spinning tourist attraction, while Lisa is struck by the awful thought that her genetic make-up means she will follow in her familys footsteps and end up stupid

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A tax audit leads Homer into big trouble, leaving him with no choice but to make amends by helping the government nail Mr Burns for the theft of a trillion-dollar banknote

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a childrens news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockmans book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: After a virtual pit stop in Langkawi in Malaysia, the race continues as the celeb teams push on without a break. Crabbiness creeps in as the teams must catch and sell crabs. programme.desc: Homer leads a rebellion of loser dads against the friendship between Bart and a child who is famous influencer

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present the semi-final in which the amateurs face a trio of patisserie challenges, including a delicate layered slice signature and a regional French classic in the technical. Only Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith know the answer

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: They came, they saw, they baked - and along the way nine of them were eliminated from the competition. Now only three amateur bakers remain to compete in the final. All they need to do to impress Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith is produce a carrot cake worthy of winning, come out tops in a technical based on a Belgian recipe and rustle up a showstopping banquet fit for the Mad Hatters Tea Party. Everything is still to play for - and Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas are on hand to lighten the atmosphere if it all gets too tense

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood look for perfection as they test the eight remaining bakers on three very different types of pastry. For the signature, the cooks are given a Danish-style task, before facing a technical challenge in which they have limited time and instructions to bake a classic British tart. Finally, the contestants create a bite-size showstopper using a fine pastry that is notoriously difficult to make, and even trickier to bake. Also, Mel discovers the history of Baklava, a dessert that originates in the palaces of Sultans

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the first ever botanical week, the seven remaining cooks face three tasks inspired by nature as the competition to become Britains best amateur baker continues. programme.desc: The murder of Frank Rodriguez, orchestrated in September 2000 by his wife Angelina who hoped to collect $250,000 from his life insurance. programme.desc: A case from June 1992 in which teenagers Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall went missing after celebrating high school graduation. Suzies mother also vanished

programme.desc: A 13-year-old becomes close to an older group of friends before she goes missing. Her inner circle suspects they know more than they let on

programme.desc: In 1985, police found the body of a beloved coach in southeast Texas, triggering a murder investigation laced with sex, jealousy, and revenge

Espionage thriller, based on John Le Carres novel, starring Richard Burton, Claire Bloom, Oskar Werner and Peter Van Eyck

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon David, 27, is airlifted to St Georges after falling 40ft to the ground, hitting several branches on his way down and landing head-first onto concrete. Having been knocked unconscious for 10 minutes, the medical team must urgently assess him for internal injuries. Anne, 74, arrives with a sharp pain in her chest, 51-year-old taxi driver Mark receives treatment for a cut on his finger caused by broken glass, and 92-year-old Betty is brought in by ambulance after her carers found her with slurred speech and a shaking hand

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Cameras capture the work of some of Britains busiest air ambulance teams as they race to save lives. The helicopter medics cut short an appearance at a charity event in Suffolk to treat a dirtbiker whos crashed at speed. Sammy has a cardiac arrest while working at a windfarm, and Stephen breaks his thigh while off-road motorbiking in the Pennines

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff at St Georges Hospital tackle one of their most dramatic emergencies when 60-year-old rail worker Alan is airlifted to the helipad after being hit by a high-speed train. A CT scan reveals he has suffered multiple fractures and loss of blood flow to his right arm. Without circulation he will lose the limb, so the medical team tries everything to save it, including complicated surgery. Meanwhile, 95-year-old Betty is brought in after experiencing breathing difficulties at home, and retired engineer James, 63, has a nasty cut to his head and weakness in his arms following a tumble down the stairs

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eleven-month-old Isabel is rushed to St Georges after suffering a seizure and losing consciousness, while 22-year-old Felix is brought to AandE with a self-inflicted stab wound to his stomach. Retired engineer Bill, 68, fell 15ft from a ladder while cutting a leylandii hedge. He arrives by air ambulance with breathing difficulties and suspected multiple fractures

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The camping critics penultimate stop is at Mynydd Derwydd, a wild camping site on the edge of Clocaenog Forest in south-west Wales. With 250 acres of stunning scenery to explore, but next to no facilities, campsite owner Llyr tries to win them over with a bushcraft skills workshop, a lamb barbecue and a breakfast delivery of fresh farm produce

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dressage champion Natasha Baker is the first of five Paralympic athletes hosting dinner parties, serving up an evening of home-cooked food and old-fashioned family entertainment to judoka Chris Skelley, sports presenter Arthur Williams, wheelchair basketball player Amy Conroy and retired swimmer Liz Johnson

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Paralympic judoka Chris Skelley gets to grips with the pots and pans on the second night of the dinner party challenge. Wheelchair basketball star Amy Conroy is confused by his menu, although retired swimmer Liz Johnson is impressed with the starter. The entire group are all blown away by Chriss motivation for a medal in Tokyo, while his karaoke performance is memorable for entirely different reasons

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hopes are high for Paralympic presenter Arthur Williams as he serves up an international menu - fondue from Switzerland, nasi goreng from the Far East and apple crumble from the UK

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wheelchair basketball star Amy Conroy fears that her simple menu is not going to be enough to grab the £1,000 prize, so ups the ante with a night fit for historical heroes. Its a fun evening as Amy welcomes her guests dressed as Cleopatra and first through the door is Arthur as Einstein, followed by Chris claiming to be Julius Caesar. Bringing a bit of style to the evening is Natasha, who comes as Audrey Hepburn, and finally Liz, whos opted to come as a suffragette. Will Amys night of history and beer pong be enough to overcome a beige menu and clinch the cash?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final host of the week is retired swimmer Liz Johnson, whos hoping that her menu of personal favourites will win her the £1,000 prize for charity. Without exception, Lizs guests embrace her onesie dress code, especially Chris who is bear-ly recognisable on arrival. Natasha isnt a fan of the fishy starter, but Arthur and Chris bond over her leftovers - a sight that touches the heart strings of Amy. The group swaps tales of previous games over paella and their competitive spirit is unleashed over a kazoo competition

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo and Neil are about to start their next big adventure and move from their home in Exeter to start a new life in Lecce in southern Italy. They want a property that has a guest annex to accommodate friends and family, and thats close to the beach so Neil can surf whenever he wants. Armed with a budget of £200,000, Jasmine Harman shows them five properties for them to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth heads to Los Gigantes, Tenerife to meet ambulance dispatcher Helen and builder Andrew from Yorkshire who are looking for a holiday home. Armed with a budget of £130,000 , Lee shows the couple five properties with hopes that one of them will be their dream holiday home

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Carol are looking for a holiday home in the south-west of Tenerife. Property expert Danni Menzies shows them five properties she trusts will prove suitable within their £120,000 budget

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Rachael and Tim, who cannot decide to do with their home in Wandsworth, south London. New Jersey-born Rachael wants to up sticks and move to the countryside to bring up their children in more rural surroundings, and she is finding their four-bedroom semi something of a squeeze. However, local lad Tim would rather stay closer to his friends and family. Kirstie comes up with a plan to make better use of the space, while Phil aims to show the couple three properties that prove the grass is greener outside the M25

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: Rollo and Olivia have decided to swap city life for the rolling Chiltern Hills, snapping up an old barbers shop and its attached 17th-century building in Amersham. Run as a business for over 100 years, the Grade II listed hairdressers is in a state of serious disrepair. Their plan to convert the loft and create a modern open-plan ground floor is perfect for modern family living, but its a risk in a building thats over 300 years old

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kim is looking for a holiday home on Spains eastern Costa del Sol and shes brought her younger sister Debbie along to help. Both Kim and Debbie grew up by the sea in south Wales, so they desperately want their holiday home to be within a stones throw of a beach. Leah Charles-King shows them what their £115,000 can get as she lines up five properties for them to visit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Whitney and Rose have been married for eight years and dream about having their own holiday home around La Zenia on the Spanish southern Costa Blanca, where they can enjoy an all-year-round warm climate. Now, they feel the time is finally right for them to make their dream a reality and theyre putting all their hopes in property expert Ben Hillman to find them something suitable on a budget of £80,000

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition starts at the Mevagissey Bay Hotel in Cornwall, where owners John and Elleke Ross hope that the stunning sea views will live up to their premium price tag. Guests Sarah and Jay savour the sights, while Catherine and Andrew are dazzled by the decking but puzzled by a mysterious gap around their door. During the afternoon fishing trip, John is angling to outdo solo contestant Sarah, but her take on the facilities leaves the hosts all at sea. In the morning, Catherine and Andrew get a rude awakening, and the breakfast pre-order system gives the other guests food for thought

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week takes place at Glebe House Cottages in Devon, which is owned by Jay and Sarah Brewer

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Kings Park Hotel in Retford, Nottinghamshire, which hosts Catherine and Andrew Watt converted from a former police station

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to The Dukes in Heath and Reach, Bedfordshire, and while owner Sarah Smith impresses the guests at dinner, the pressure gets to her at breakfast time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid, while also settling some scores

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: A woman who is 29 weeks pregnant is semi-conscious with a suspected blood clot in her lungs. Dr Scott fears that she could lose her baby and her life. Meanwhile, Dr Luke races against time to save a students arm after a machete attack left a deep wound, and Dr Mya examines an injured mountain biker who took a jump on a country trail and flew eight metres before landing hard

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Peter, 85, has been brought - unwillingly - to AandE by his stepson Brian. He cut his finger on some wire two weeks earlier and his hand is swollen and wont stop bleeding. Emma, 23, is rushed to St Georges after crashing her car on the way to her fathers house, while doctors also see to 86-year-old Harry, who fell down a flight of stairs a day earlier but didnt seek treatment. Ciaran, 27, injured his ankle the previous night while out with friends and was given a temporary cast. Emergency nurse practitioner Helen needs to get him X-rayed and replastered, but he faces a return visit for an operation

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 68-year-old professional actor visits St Georges Hospital after injuring his shoulder while rushing to catch a train, and a check-up indicates he may need corrective surgery to set things right, but further assessment suggests he might be living with a much more serious condition. An octogenarian couple are rushed in to AandE after being knocked over by a motorcyclist while crossing the road, and the police maintain an active presence as paramedics bring in a man who has collapsed after a suspected drug overdose. Plus, an 88-year-old woman with a swollen leg discusses her ill-fated marriage to a much younger man nearly four decades ago

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: A woman who is 29 weeks pregnant is semi-conscious with a suspected blood clot in her lungs. Dr Scott fears that she could lose her baby and her life. Meanwhile, Dr Luke races against time to save a students arm after a machete attack left a deep wound, and Dr Mya examines an injured mountain biker who took a jump on a country trail and flew eight metres before landing hard

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Peter, 85, has been brought - unwillingly - to AandE by his stepson Brian. He cut his finger on some wire two weeks earlier and his hand is swollen and wont stop bleeding. Emma, 23, is rushed to St Georges after crashing her car on the way to her fathers house, while doctors also see to 86-year-old Harry, who fell down a flight of stairs a day earlier but didnt seek treatment. Ciaran, 27, injured his ankle the previous night while out with friends and was given a temporary cast. Emergency nurse practitioner Helen needs to get him X-rayed and replastered, but he faces a return visit for an operation

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon David, 27, is airlifted to St Georges after falling 40ft to the ground, hitting several branches on his way down and landing head-first onto concrete. Having been knocked unconscious for 10 minutes, the medical team must urgently assess him for internal injuries. Anne, 74, arrives with a sharp pain in her chest, 51-year-old taxi driver Mark receives treatment for a cut on his finger caused by broken glass, and 92-year-old Betty is brought in by ambulance after her carers found her with slurred speech and a shaking hand

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Ending their tour of north Wales in search of the perfect pitch, the seasoned campers arrive at The Oyster Farm Caravan Site on Anglesey. Marine biologist-turned-campsite host Shaun welcomes the campers with freshly caught oysters and his own oyster gin, before sending them on an aquatic tour of the nearby Puffin Island. The weeks winner of the coveted plaque and £2,000 cash prize is then announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Gloucestershire to meet Tom, who is obsessed with motocross. Henry upcycles two Porsche wheel rims into a cool pair of stools

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Sussex to meet Bill and Annie, who have a penchant for Star Wars collectibles and most importantly, as far as Henry is concerned, motorbikes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jon and Julia Shorrock host the first round of the BandB competition from their four-star Derwent House in West Sussex. The guests are split by gender to sample the area, with the men firing machine guns at a shooting range and the women relaxing at a spa - but a carpeted bathroom and shower without hot water raise questions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Peter and Sharron Sorsky invite their fellow competitors to Kirkby Park BandB in Liverpool, but the presence of a security camera on the outside of the house leaves one guest feeling uneasy. Room inspections uncover all manner of unsightly problems, but a tour of nearby Knowsley Safari Park gives the contestants a chance to enjoy themselves

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Julian Banner-Price host the competition at their expensive BandB Plas Dinas Country House in Snowdonia, giving their new guests the priciest rooms. Peter and Sharron Sorsky are still reeling from their feedback forms and immediately find fault with the accommodation, and the group is taken to wash bedding the old-fashioned way at the local slate museum

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Annette McAnespie welcomes the group to Hazelwood Farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, for the final BandB visit. The initial impressions are favourable and Peter and Jon begin to bond for the first time during a mosaic class, but not everyone feels up to the planned activity of a cycling tour

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time at Annette McAnespies farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances, before the weeks winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Brighton, where the first host, 30-year-old medical editor and rapper Adam, serves up a simple yet wholesome and flavoursome vegetarian menu. His guests are 29-year-old copywriter Will, 65-year-old retired advertising sales director Gill, 56-year-old builder Russell and 43-year-old teacher Jo

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Copywriter Will serves up a vegetarian meal on the second evening in Brighton. Theres a seafood surprise over the starter, which leaves teacher Jo with fishy fingers, and Wills risotto is upstaged by a Lady and the Tramp moment between retired sales director Gill and builder Russell. Not one to be outdone, Will gets everyone up to have it large in his living room with a rendition of his own dance track

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired advertising sales director Gill hosts the third dinner party of the week in and around Brighton, hoping to impress her guests with a Middle Eastern menu and a fun dress code. Jo, Adam, Will and a newcomer to the group, social worker Ruth, all arrive wearing hats to reflect their personalities, leading to some unexpected revelations and a chance to find out more about newcomer Ruth. Gills cooking impresses, but its not all plain sailing, as theres some honest feedback for her to swallow

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in and around Brighton, teacher and surfer Jo, treats her guests to an exotic, tropical-themed evening with a Thai menu. Her guests arrive in their most tropical attire, but after a confident start, with a cheeky massage thrown in for good measure, Jos hit-and-miss food and a dessert drama leave her slightly panicked

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Brighton, the final day of the competition sees social worker Ruth try to impress her guests with her Jewish-Irish fusion menu. Theres chaos in the kitchen before the guests even arrive, then after a mixed-up main and some unexpected veggies, Ruths secret family cheesecake has her guests guessing if it lives up to the bill

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB competition heads to France as four British expats compete, beginning with Lisanne Ashton, who runs the rural Les Chimeres in the south of the country. After searching for truffles in the surrounding area, guest Tony Hortons passion for the royal family causes him to clash with fellow competitor Shaun Baggs, whose mood is worsened by the discovery of bugs in his bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition continues at Le Manoir in the Dordogne, owned by royalist Tony Horton and his Armenian wife Shou Shou - who make a poor first impression by presenting guests with a timetable specifying when they are allowed to use the bathroom. A vinegar-tasting session also receives a tepid response, and some of the visitors are bemused by their hosts turning up for breakfast in costume

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wine-loving Shaun Baggs and his partner Patrick Weaver bring the contest to Le Clos Rabelais in central France, where they invite fellow competitors to take part in a traditional French dance class. Tension mounts as George and Linda become increasingly frustrated with Lisanne, and the bickering continues over dinner when Shaun is confronted about his previous negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: George and Linda McGill welcome their guests to the Moulin de la Civiere near Rostrenen in Brittany, where entertainment comes in the shape of a tenpin-bowling outing, and the couple lay on a full English breakfast. However, the hosts receive an unexpected surprise at feedback time courtesy of Lisanne

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in Hertfordshire, with Phil searching for properties for Rich and Bethan, who have lost out on two homes already. Meanwhile, Kirstie helps Chicago-born Lauren and her husband Paul come to terms with the smaller scale of British properties

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit the garden city of Milton Keynes to bring harmony to a couple who are worlds apart - both physically and emotionally. Anne-Marie and Paul bought their charming-but-challenging 1920s three-bedroom home six years ago, right before the arrival of their first child. The property was a doer-upper but hasnt been done up yet! Paul wants to list it. Between his twice-a-week 160-mile commute to Manchester, the boxed-in kitchen, and the unforgivable absence of a bathtub in their only bathroom, hes ready to cut his losses and move on. Anne-Marie, on the other hand, refuses to throw in the towel. With family close by and a belief in the houses untapped potential, shes clinging to her dream and counting on Kirstie to work her magic and convince Paul to fall in love with their home again. With a £50,000 Love It budget and an ambitious to-do list, Kirstie gets straight to work, crafting a master plan to unlock every ounce of the houses potential. But just as things get rolling, disaster strikes - a surprise roof repair gobbles up a significant chunk of the budget, leaving Team Love It to rethink their strategy. Meanwhile, Phil takes Anne-Marie and Paul to Rugby, hoping to split the commute burden, and finds jaw-dropping properties with his £500,000 List It budget that leave Anne-Marie questioning her allegiances and Paul well and truly sold

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: A second Christmas during the Owens farmhouse renovation is fast approaching, and Amanda and the kids are preparing their farm animals and pets for the cold weather. Richard is keen to get doors fitted so that the house is protected from the elements, while Amanda and her daughter Clemmie meet historian Derek to walk in the footsteps of Anty Johns former occupant, diarist Anthony Clarkson

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Bob, 51, is airlifted to St Georges after falling 20ft from a ladder while repairing his roof. With debris in his wound, doctors are concerned he could develop a life-threatening infection. Retired pharmacologist Anthony, 68, receives help for a chronic gas problem, while 83-year-old Gladys collapsed on the stairs at home and has a dangerously low heart rate

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Zaki, 63, recently underwent a tonsillectomy following a diagnosis of throat cancer, but he has come to AandE after suffering a serious bleed. Doctors try to save 10-month-old baby Amy, who stopped breathing at home, while 21-year-old expectant father Craig appears to have had a miraculous escape after a motocross accident, but has he learnt his lesson?

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, Anthony needs specialist attention after he comes off his motorbike. Helicopter medics are diverted from a training mission to help Deyon, who is trapped in his car after a crash on a country road. Meanwhile in Norfolk, theres an urgent call to a cardiac arrest

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Bob, 51, is airlifted to St Georges after falling 20ft from a ladder while repairing his roof. With debris in his wound, doctors are concerned he could develop a life-threatening infection. Retired pharmacologist Anthony, 68, receives help for a chronic gas problem, while 83-year-old Gladys collapsed on the stairs at home and has a dangerously low heart rate

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 68-year-old professional actor visits St Georges Hospital after injuring his shoulder while rushing to catch a train, and a check-up indicates he may need corrective surgery to set things right, but further assessment suggests he might be living with a much more serious condition. An octogenarian couple are rushed in to AandE after being knocked over by a motorcyclist while crossing the road, and the police maintain an active presence as paramedics bring in a man who has collapsed after a suspected drug overdose. Plus, an 88-year-old woman with a swollen leg discusses her ill-fated marriage to a much younger man nearly four decades ago

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of previous investigations from the programme delving into the secrets behind mass-produced food. Jimmy Doherty heads to Kenya to find out what makes one tea more expensive than another, before meeting a taster for one of the UKs largest tea producers. Matt Tebbutt braves the icy waters of the North Sea to join divers harvesting scallops by hand from the sea bed, and Kate Quilton is in Israel to learn why some limes are much juicier than others

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Gloucestershire to meet Bryan, whos been collecting everything and anything since childhood. Henry upcycles some old oxygen regulators into bedside lamps, while Simon settles for restoring a stylish and traditional wooden dresser

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting Windsor to meet Pete and Phil, who rent out cars to the film and TV business. Henry finds an Austrian moped which is missing an engine, while Simon picks a fibreglass suit of armour

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: A woman who is 29 weeks pregnant is semi-conscious with a suspected blood clot in her lungs. Dr Scott fears that she could lose her baby and her life. Meanwhile, Dr Luke races against time to save a students arm after a machete attack left a deep wound, and Dr Mya examines an injured mountain biker who took a jump on a country trail and flew eight metres before landing hard

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff at St Georges Hospital tackle one of their most dramatic emergencies when 60-year-old rail worker Alan is airlifted to the helipad after being hit by a high-speed train. A CT scan reveals he has suffered multiple fractures and loss of blood flow to his right arm. Without circulation he will lose the limb, so the medical team tries everything to save it, including complicated surgery. Meanwhile, 95-year-old Betty is brought in after experiencing breathing difficulties at home, and retired engineer James, 63, has a nasty cut to his head and weakness in his arms following a tumble down the stairs

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eleven-month-old Isabel is rushed to St Georges after suffering a seizure and losing consciousness, while 22-year-old Felix is brought to AandE with a self-inflicted stab wound to his stomach. Retired engineer Bill, 68, fell 15ft from a ladder while cutting a leylandii hedge. He arrives by air ambulance with breathing difficulties and suspected multiple fractures

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The camping critics penultimate stop is at Mynydd Derwydd, a wild camping site on the edge of Clocaenog Forest in south-west Wales. With 250 acres of stunning scenery to explore, but next to no facilities, campsite owner Llyr tries to win them over with a bushcraft skills workshop, a lamb barbecue and a breakfast delivery of fresh farm produce

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dressage champion Natasha Baker is the first of five Paralympic athletes hosting dinner parties, serving up an evening of home-cooked food and old-fashioned family entertainment to judoka Chris Skelley, sports presenter Arthur Williams, wheelchair basketball player Amy Conroy and retired swimmer Liz Johnson

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Paralympic judoka Chris Skelley gets to grips with the pots and pans on the second night of the dinner party challenge. Wheelchair basketball star Amy Conroy is confused by his menu, although retired swimmer Liz Johnson is impressed with the starter. The entire group are all blown away by Chriss motivation for a medal in Tokyo, while his karaoke performance is memorable for entirely different reasons

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hopes are high for Paralympic presenter Arthur Williams as he serves up an international menu - fondue from Switzerland, nasi goreng from the Far East and apple crumble from the UK

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wheelchair basketball star Amy Conroy fears that her simple menu is not going to be enough to grab the £1,000 prize, so ups the ante with a night fit for historical heroes. Its a fun evening as Amy welcomes her guests dressed as Cleopatra and first through the door is Arthur as Einstein, followed by Chris claiming to be Julius Caesar. Bringing a bit of style to the evening is Natasha, who comes as Audrey Hepburn, and finally Liz, whos opted to come as a suffragette. Will Amys night of history and beer pong be enough to overcome a beige menu and clinch the cash?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final host of the week is retired swimmer Liz Johnson, whos hoping that her menu of personal favourites will win her the £1,000 prize for charity. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Sussex to meet Bill and Annie, who have a penchant for Star Wars collectibles and most importantly, as far as Henry is concerned, motorbikes

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jon and Julia Shorrock host the first round of the BandB competition from their four-star Derwent House in West Sussex. The guests are split by gender to sample the area, with the men firing machine guns at a shooting range and the women relaxing at a spa - but a carpeted bathroom and shower without hot water raise questions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Peter and Sharron Sorsky invite their fellow competitors to Kirkby Park BandB in Liverpool, but the presence of a security camera on the outside of the house leaves one guest feeling uneasy. Room inspections uncover all manner of unsightly problems, but a tour of nearby Knowsley Safari Park gives the contestants a chance to enjoy themselves

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andy and Julian Banner-Price host the competition at their expensive BandB Plas Dinas Country House in Snowdonia, giving their new guests the priciest rooms. Peter and Sharron Sorsky are still reeling from their feedback forms and immediately find fault with the accommodation, and the group is taken to wash bedding the old-fashioned way at the local slate museum

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Annette McAnespie welcomes the group to Hazelwood Farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, for the final BandB visit. The initial impressions are favourable and Peter and Jon begin to bond for the first time during a mosaic class, but not everyone feels up to the planned activity of a cycling tour

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time at Annette McAnespies farm in Crayke, North Yorkshire, to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances, before the weeks winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Brighton, where the first host, 30-year-old medical editor and rapper Adam, serves up a simple yet wholesome and flavoursome vegetarian menu. His guests are 29-year-old copywriter Will, 65-year-old retired advertising sales director Gill, 56-year-old builder Russell and 43-year-old teacher Jo

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Copywriter Will serves up a vegetarian meal on the second evening in Brighton. Theres a seafood surprise over the starter, which leaves teacher Jo with fishy fingers, and Wills risotto is upstaged by a Lady and the Tramp moment between retired sales director Gill and builder Russell. Not one to be outdone, Will gets everyone up to have it large in his living room with a rendition of his own dance track

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired advertising sales director Gill hosts the third dinner party of the week in and around Brighton, hoping to impress her guests with a Middle Eastern menu and a fun dress code. Jo, Adam, Will and a newcomer to the group, social worker Ruth, all arrive wearing hats to reflect their personalities, leading to some unexpected revelations and a chance to find out more about newcomer Ruth. Gills cooking impresses, but its not all plain sailing, as theres some honest feedback for her to swallow

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host in and around Brighton, teacher and surfer Jo, treats her guests to an exotic, tropical-themed evening with a Thai menu. Her guests arrive in their most tropical attire, but after a confident start, with a cheeky massage thrown in for good measure, Jos hit-and-miss food and a dessert drama leave her slightly panicked

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Brighton, the final day of the competition sees social worker Ruth try to impress her guests with her Jewish-Irish fusion menu. Theres chaos in the kitchen before the guests even arrive, then after a mixed-up main and some unexpected veggies, Ruths secret family cheesecake has her guests guessing if it lives up to the bill

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB competition heads to France as four British expats compete, beginning with Lisanne Ashton, who runs the rural Les Chimeres in the south of the country. After searching for truffles in the surrounding area, guest Tony Hortons passion for the royal family causes him to clash with fellow competitor Shaun Baggs, whose mood is worsened by the discovery of bugs in his bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition continues at Le Manoir in the Dordogne, owned by royalist Tony Horton and his Armenian wife Shou Shou - who make a poor first impression by presenting guests with a timetable specifying when they are allowed to use the bathroom. A vinegar-tasting session also receives a tepid response, and some of the visitors are bemused by their hosts turning up for breakfast in costume

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wine-loving Shaun Baggs and his partner Patrick Weaver bring the contest to Le Clos Rabelais in central France, where they invite fellow competitors to take part in a traditional French dance class. Tension mounts as George and Linda become increasingly frustrated with Lisanne, and the bickering continues over dinner when Shaun is confronted about his previous negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: George and Linda McGill welcome their guests to the Moulin de la Civiere near Rostrenen in Brittany, where entertainment comes in the shape of a tenpin-bowling outing, and the couple lay on a full English breakfast. However, the hosts receive an unexpected surprise at feedback time courtesy of Lisanne

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in Hertfordshire, with Phil searching for properties for Rich and Bethan, who have lost out on two homes already. Meanwhile, Kirstie helps Chicago-born Lauren and her husband Paul come to terms with the smaller scale of British properties

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit the garden city of Milton Keynes to bring harmony to a couple who are worlds apart - both physically and emotionally. Anne-Marie and Paul bought their charming-but-challenging 1920s three-bedroom home six years ago, right before the arrival of their first child. The property was a doer-upper but hasnt been done up yet! Paul wants to list it. Between his twice-a-week 160-mile commute to Manchester, the boxed-in kitchen, and the unforgivable absence of a bathtub in their only bathroom, hes ready to cut his losses and move on. Anne-Marie, on the other hand, refuses to throw in the towel. With family close by and a belief in the houses untapped potential, shes clinging to her dream and counting on Kirstie to work her magic and convince Paul to fall in love with their home again. With a £50,000 Love It budget and an ambitious to-do list, Kirstie gets straight to work, crafting a master plan to unlock every ounce of the houses potential. But just as things get rolling, disaster strikes - a surprise roof repair gobbles up a significant chunk of the budget, leaving Team Love It to rethink their strategy. Meanwhile, Phil takes Anne-Marie and Paul to Rugby, hoping to split the commute burden, and finds jaw-dropping properties with his £500,000 List It budget that leave Anne-Marie questioning her allegiances and Paul well and truly sold

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: A second Christmas during the Owens farmhouse renovation is fast approaching, and Amanda and the kids are preparing their farm animals and pets for the cold weather. Richard is keen to get doors fitted so that the house is protected from the elements, while Amanda and her daughter Clemmie meet historian Derek to walk in the footsteps of Anty Johns former occupant, diarist Anthony Clarkson

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Bob, 51, is airlifted to St Georges after falling 20ft from a ladder while repairing his roof. With debris in his wound, doctors are concerned he could develop a life-threatening infection. Retired pharmacologist Anthony, 68, receives help for a chronic gas problem, while 83-year-old Gladys collapsed on the stairs at home and has a dangerously low heart rate

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 68-year-old professional actor visits St Georges Hospital after injuring his shoulder while rushing to catch a train, and a check-up indicates he may need corrective surgery to set things right, but further assessment suggests he might be living with a much more serious condition. An octogenarian couple are rushed in to AandE after being knocked over by a motorcyclist while crossing the road, and the police maintain an active presence as paramedics bring in a man who has collapsed after a suspected drug overdose.
