programme.desc: Neil Oliver explores the age of Celtic Britain, a time of warriors, druids and kings of unimaginable wealth. He learns about a celebrated warrior from 300BC, the owner of a remarkable Iron Age sword, and tries his hand at divination as he explores the power of Celtic priests

programme.title: The World After Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver charts the brutal battles that marked the beginning of Roman Britain, discovering evidence of the empires artillery and its first roads and forts. He examines the rebellion led by Queen Boudicca, which resulted in the deaths of thousands of Romans in St Albans, London and Colchester, and learns more about the creation of Hadrians Wall

programme.title: The World After Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver concludes his journey through ancient history by focusing on the legacy of the Romans. He digs beneath a London tower block, examines building work from a large stadium and investigates the remains of an African woman who lived in York 1,800 years ago

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: Islands in Loch Lomond: Landlocked Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton turns his attention to the countrys landlocked islands. He travels to Loch Lomond to get a birds-eye view of an iconic beauty spot, before gaining an insight into the lives of its residents

programme.title: The World After Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver explores the origins of ancient Britain and its people. He dives for 3,000-year-old treasure and potholes through an ancient copper mine to discover how a golden age of bronze gave way to a period of social and economic crisis and sharp climate change, eventually to be replaced by a new era of iron

programme.title: The World After Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver explores the age of Celtic Britain, a time of warriors, druids and kings of unimaginable wealth. He learns about a celebrated warrior from 300BC, the owner of a remarkable Iron Age sword, and tries his hand at divination as he explores the power of Celtic priests

programme.title: The World After Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver charts the brutal battles that marked the beginning of Roman Britain, discovering evidence of the empires artillery and its first roads and forts. He examines the rebellion led by Queen Boudicca, which resulted in the deaths of thousands of Romans in St Albans, London and Colchester, and learns more about the creation of Hadrians Wall

programme.title: The World After Stonehenge
programme.desc: Neil Oliver concludes his journey through ancient history by focusing on the legacy of the Romans. He digs beneath a London tower block, examines building work from a large stadium and investigates the remains of an African woman who lived in York 1,800 years ago

programme.title: King Arthurs Britain: The Truth Unearthed
programme.desc: With access to a major new excavation on the Tintagel peninsula in Cornwall, Professor Alice Roberts pulls together the latest evidence to reveal what Dark Age Britain was really like. Long known to have been a Dark Ages settlement, the new evidence reveals that Tintagel was also a seat of power, and Alice explores the link between the location and Arthurian legend, tracking down the early sources for the period and the first written reference to King Arthur

programme.title: The Great Fire
programme.desc: Dan Jones, Suzannah Lipscomb and Rob Bell take a fresh look at the Great Fire of London in 1666 by walking the actual route the fire took across the city, hour-by-hour and street-by-street, hoping to uncover what really happened during Britains worst inferno. In this first edition, the three presenters investigate how the fire started, heading to Pudding Lane, site of the bakery where the blaze broke out. Dan and historian Dorian Gerhold then place a temporary blue plaque on the very spot where the fire began

programme.title: The Great Fire
programme.desc: The team continues to walk the path of the infamous inferno, uncovering what really happened on the worst day of the four-day rampage. Dan Jones charts the destruction of the citys buildings, including Londons spiritual home St Pauls Cathedral, which burned so fiercely its stones exploded. Suzannah Lipscomb reveals how Pudding Lane baker Thomas Farriner made sure no blame landed on him and Rob Bell finds out how the fire moved so fast

programme.title: The Great Fire
programme.desc: Documentary following the last day of the fires rampage through the city of London in 1666, and the after-effects that changed the capital city for ever. The team investigate the treatment for burns victims, and how authorities dealt with the 100,000 refugees made homeless. Finally, they walk through some of the streets where the fires impact still endures, and look at how London was rebuilt from the ashes

programme.title: King Arthurs Britain: The Truth Unearthed

Long known to have been a Dark Ages settlement, the new evidence reveals that Tintagel was also a seat of power, and Alice explores the link between the location and Arthurian legend, tracking down the early sources for the period and the first written reference to King Arthur

programme.desc: A painting depicting the Lebanese city of Beirut arrives at the barn. It was painted by Nonny Jackson-Twists grandfather just after the Second World War. programme.title: The Repair Shop

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Silversmith Brenton West repairs a boxing trophy won by an accomplished sportsman and much-loved grandfather. Larry Gaines fought professionally from 1923 and refused to let prejudice hamper his career. He was the first black boxer to fight in the Royal Albert Hall and his family is immensely proud of him. Also being restored are a pair of old football boots and a vintage globe. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.desc: Sarah Readings presents a very well-loved and very well-travelled companion in need of help from soft toy experts Amanda Middleditch and Julie Tatchell. programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Alex and his son Flynn bring in their cherished stuffed toy lamb for the attention of soft toy specialists Amanda Middleditch and Julie Tatchell. The toy was given to Alex when he was just four months old and after a lifetime of cuddling it has lost an eye, an ear and is less squishy than they would like. Next in is Alejandro with his Great Grandmothers breadcrumb maker that is over 100-years-old and has been passed through generations of his family. Years of use has left the machine unusable but with any luck, metal expert Dominic Chinea will be able to bring it back to life. programme.desc: A painting depicting the Lebanese city of Beirut arrives at the barn. It was painted by Nonny Jackson-Twists grandfather just after the Second World War. programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Hearing from a young Kerry man who has taken on a series of adventure challenges in some of the most remote and inaccessible places on Earth. Presented by Anne Cassin

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Grace Pearson is found dead at a local festival. Detective Inspector Sam Gillespie - to the bewilderment of newly arrived Detective Sergeant Felix Livingstone - uses Sister Boniface as his scientific adviser. She determines that Pearson died by suffocation after her head was pushed into sawdust. The investigation leads to the three Bellamy siblings, at whose home Pearson was a housemaid. Crime drama, starring Lorna Watson and Max Brown, with Belinda Lang and Robert Daws

programme.title: Frankie Drake Mysteries
programme.desc: After her wartime friend goes missing in London, Frankie must work with Agatha Christie (guest star Honeysuckle Weeks) to uncover the reason behind the disappearance. Period crime drama, starring Lauren Lee Smith as the first female private detective in 1920s Toronto

programme.title: For Peats Sake
programme.desc: The vital role turf has played in Ireland and the battle that ensued when the EU tried to stop Irish people cutting turf. For thousands of years people in Ireland have cut turf to heat their homes and cook their food. It was an accessible, affordable and vital fuel, made from the very soil of Ireland itself. Then in the 1990s people realised that there was a lot more to bogs than cheap fuel

programme.title: RTÉ News: One OClock and Weather
Home of the Year
programme.desc: Judges examine Finbarr and Gareths two-storey brick house in Dublin, Erica and Liams new-build bungalow in County Mayo, and Laoises turret-style home in Galway

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: Mary is excited to join the charitable ladies circle on an outing to one of their philanthropical endeavours, which Ma decides to gatecrash, but the pair come face to face with a place that holds painful memories from their past. Sam is put on the back foot after the conservative Mr Hugill from the board comes to visit, while Liza seeks to make amends with Adella after getting her into trouble at the tea party

programme.title: Irelands Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the National Museum and National Library of Ireland, beginning with the story of the Brasky Mass, a 4.5-billion-year-old meteorite, and its voyage from space to Irish soil

programme.title: Romancing the Stone (1984)
programme.desc: A romantic novelist goes in search of her kidnapped sister in the steamy jungles of South America, only to become the target of a villainous general who demands as a ransom the valuable treasure map in her possession. Help is at hand in the form of a craggy daredevil fortune hunter, who has his eye on a share of the profits. Comedy adventure, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito

programme.title: Fair City
programme.desc: As Nicola faces up to problems with his appeal, Paul faces a moral dilemma in prison. Mondo looks to the future, but Hayley is surprised when her family doubts her sincerity. Ben is caught in a lie by a disappointed Zoe, and Emma helps Gwen find the answers shes been looking for

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: After 18 years in Aarons mothers house, Aileen and Aaron sell up to renovate a spacious Victorian townhouse in New Ross. However, a tight budget, DIY challenges, and the early return of Aarons mother Joan puts pressure on the project

programme.title: Leonard and Hungry Paul
programme.desc: After a successful first date Leonard is head over heels for Shelley, though is unnerved when he hears she is due to go to the cinema with a man called Patrick. After obsessively questioning who he might be, Leonard knows he must ask Shelley outright. Elsewhere, Hungry Paul has been shortlisted for the e-mail sign-off phrase competition and attends the awards ceremony with his family, leading to a new opportunity for him with the National Mime Association. Comedy, narrated by Julia Roberts and starring Alex Lawther and Laurie Kynaston

programme.title: The Tommy Tiernan Show
programme.desc: Chat show in which neither the presenter nor the viewers are told the identity of the guests in advance. With the comedian in the dark about who he will be interviewing until they walk out to greet him, anything can happen - especially if Tommy doesnt have a clue who they are

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: The Edinburgh detective investigates the murder of notorious gangster Morris Caffertys illegitimate son, as the search goes on to find the person who put Sammy in a life-threatening coma. The hunt for the killer is complicated by apparent links to a spate of hate crimes by racist extremists in the city centre. Gritty crime thriller, starring John Hannah and James Cosmo

programme.title: Wonders of the Moon with Dara O Briain
programme.desc: Part one of two. Dara explores the ways in which the moon shapes many things on Earth and why there is a new race to get humans back to its surface. He meets astrobiologist Professor Lewis Dartnell to find out just how far the moons influence on life on Earth extends. He also talks to Dr Rohin Francis to dig deeper into the myths surrounding the moons influence on human behaviour, and discuss some of the latest evidence

programme.title: The Complaints Bureau
programme.desc: Consumer programme The Complaints Bureau returns for a new series on RTÉ One. Finance expert Eoin McGee sets the caseload for three consumer journalists advocating and arguing on behalf of members of the public who have hit brick walls. The trio - Conor Pope, Amy Molloy and Siobhan Maguire tackle problems big, small and seemingly intractable. Along the way there are frustrations, dead ends, awkward interviews, cautionary tales and, sometimes at least, successful results.

programme.title: The Sunday Game Live
programme.desc: Galway v Waterford (Throw-in 2.15pm). Joanne Cantwell presents coverage of the National Camogie League Division 1A final from Nowlan Park. Galway were runners-up to Cork last year, while Waterford are making their first ever appearance in this final

programme.title: The Sunday Game Live
programme.desc: Armagh v Tyrone (Throw-in 4.15pm). Coverage of the Ulster Senior Football Championship first-round match at BOX-IT Athletic Grounds. These teams met in the semi-finals last year, with Armagh claiming victory but narrowly losing out to Donegal after extra time in the showpiece match

programme.title: Junior (1994)
programme.desc: A fertility expert pioneers a treatment enabling men to become pregnant and carry babies to full term. When the authorities cancel funding for the research, he decides to test it on himself, but gives little thought to how difficult it will be to keep it a secret. The situation is further complicated when he starts to fall for the woman whose child he is carrying. Comedy, with Arnold Schwarzenegger, Danny DeVito, Emma Thompson and Frank Langella

programme.title: Kingdom
programme.desc: As the wet season transforms Nsefu into a lush green paradise, Storms wild dog pups must learn to navigate their new, flooded world. When their mother gives birth to a second litter, disaster strikes and the dogs place in the kingdom hangs in the balance. Leopard mother Olimba clashes with her daughter, who is forced to grow up fast. The lion prides dominance intensifies, with devastating consequences for the hyena clan

programme.title: The Sunday Game
programme.desc: Highlights and discussion of the weekends GAA games. programme.desc: A chance to see what an Irish contemporary circus looks like

programme.title: A Good Girls Guide to Murder
programme.desc: The disappearance of 17-year-old Andie Bell has haunted the town of Little Kilton for five years, a confessional text pointed the blame at her boyfriend Sal after he took his own life. Now, inquisitive teenage amateur sleuth Pip Fitz-Amobi is determined to clear his name and get to the bottom of what really happened. Crime drama based on the novel by Holly Jackson, starring Emma Myers and Zain Iqbal

programme.title: Urban Secrets

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. programme.title: Deadwood
programme.sub-title: Jewels Boot Is Made for Walking
programme.desc: Jewel continues to come under fire for the problems with her leg, so she visits Doc Cochran bearing pictures of braces, which she hopes will ease her discomfort. Meanwhile, Trixie has an appointment with Sol, and Almas father comes to town

programme.title: Peter Pan (2003)
programme.desc: The adventures of the boy who never grows old, as he whisks Wendy Darling and her brothers away to the magical world of Neverland - where they come face to face with fearsome Captain Hook. Adaptation of JM Barries fantasy novel, starring Jeremy Sumpter, Rachel Hurd-Wood, Jason Isaacs and Lynn Redgrave

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon (2024)
programme.desc: Harold and pals Moose and Porcupine live in a hand-drawn world of limitless possibilities. The trio become concerned when the Old Man, who narrates their illustrated existence, suddenly falls silent. Using his magical crayon, Harold draws a door to the real world and tumbles into the present day as a flesh-and-blood man, who collides head-on with widow Terry and her young son, Mel. Family adventure, starring Zachary Levi, Lil Rel Howery, Zooey Deschanel and Benjamin Bottani

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: Wicked (2024)
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Its the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefacts twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Wicked (2024)
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon (2024)
programme.desc: Harold and pals Moose and Porcupine live in a hand-drawn world of limitless possibilities. The trio become concerned when the Old Man, who narrates their illustrated existence, suddenly falls silent. Using his magical crayon, Harold draws a door to the real world and tumbles into the present day as a flesh-and-blood man, who collides head-on with widow Terry and her young son, Mel. Family adventure, starring Zachary Levi, Lil Rel Howery, Zooey Deschanel and Benjamin Bottani

programme.title: Ready Player One (2018)
programme.desc: In 2045, gamers explore a virtual world in the quest for a deceased tycoons fortune. However, they must also contend with an evil corporation who will stop at nothing to get their hands on the prize. Steven Spielbergs fantasy adventure based on Ernest Clines novel, starring Tye Sheridan, Olivia Cooke, Ben Mendelsohn, Simon Pegg and Mark Rylance

programme.title: The Ballad of Wallis Island (2025)
programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when ex-bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire. Comedy drama, written by and starring Tim Key and Tom Basden, with Carey Mulligan and Sian Clifford

programme.title: My First Summer (2020)
programme.desc: Isolated on a remote property after her mothers death, 16-year-old Claudia finds her world transformed when spirited teenager Grace appears. Drama, starring Markella Kavenagh and Maiah Stewardson

programme.title: Rurangi (2020)
programme.desc: After leaving a decade earlier, a transgender activist returns to the remote community of Rurangi, hoping to reconnect with his father. Drama, starring Elz Carrad and Arlo Green

programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when ex-bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire. Comedy drama, written by and starring Tim Key and Tom Basden, with Carey Mulligan and Sian Clifford

programme.desc: After leaving a decade earlier, a transgender activist returns to the remote community of Rurangi, hoping to reconnect with his father. Drama, starring Elz Carrad and Arlo Green

programme.title: A Nice Indian Boy (2024)
programme.desc: Naveen brings his fiance Jay home to meet his traditional Indian family, and they come to terms with his white-orphan-artist boyfriend while planning the wedding of their dreams. Romantic comedy, starring Karan Soni and Jonathan Groff

programme.title: I, Tonya (2017)
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespies comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance

programme.title: About a Boy (2002)
programme.desc: An idle womaniser pretends to be a father to meet women in a single mothers group - but he starts to change his selfish ways when a lonely youngster with a depressed mum becomes emotionally attached to him. Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornbys novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz

programme.title: A Different Man (2024)
programme.desc: After his facial reconstructive surgery, an aspiring actor fixates on a stage production based on his past. Psychological thriller, starring Sebastian Stan, Adam Pearson and Renate Reinsve

programme.title: Anora (2024)
programme.desc: A sex worker marries the son of an oligarch, but his family in Russia try to get the marriage annulled. Writer/director Sean Bakers Oscar-winning romantic comedy, starring Mikey Madison, Paul Weissman and Lindsey Normington

programme.title: May December (2023)
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past. Director Todd Haynes drama, starring Natalie Portman, Chris Tenzis and Julianne Moore

programme.title: The Swimmer (2021)
programme.desc: As he attends an ultra-competitive training camp with an Olympic place up for grabs, an Israeli swimmer starts to fall for one of his competitors. Drama, starring Omer Perelman Striks. In Hebrew with subtitles.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: A Nice Indian Boy (2024)
programme.desc: Naveen brings his fiance Jay home to meet his traditional Indian family, and they come to terms with his white-orphan-artist boyfriend while planning the wedding of their dreams. Romantic comedy, starring Karan Soni and Jonathan Groff

programme.title: Aisha (2022)
programme.desc: While caught up in limbo for years in Irelands immigration system, Nigerian refugee Aisha Osagie develops a close relationship with former prisoner Conor Healy. However, their friendship soon comes under threat as Aishas future in Ireland is jeopardised. Drama, starring Letitia Wright, Josh OConnor and Ruth McCabe

programme.title: May December (2023)
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past. Director Todd Haynes drama, starring Natalie Portman, Chris Tenzis and Julianne Moore

programme.title: A Different Man (2024)
programme.desc: After his facial reconstructive surgery, an aspiring actor fixates on a stage production based on his past. Psychological thriller, starring Sebastian Stan, Adam Pearson and Renate Reinsve

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.desc: A drivers life hangs in the balance following a serious accident in one of the worst snowstorms in decades. A passenger panics after getting stuck on an icy embankment

programme.desc: A driver faces a long wait after breaking down in freezing conditions. Meanwhile, a convoy of expensive motors makes a difficult detour off the A1

programme.desc: Fly-on-the-dashboard documentary showcasing outrageous road disasters, captured in video form by drivers in-vehicle dashboard cameras

Ken Stott narrates

programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood follows the case of a carer who steals from a former member of the royal household, and an armed robber who gets more than he bargained for

programme.desc: A burglar is spotted climbing into a bathroom window by a neighbour, and the owner of a hairdressing salon rushes to his salon to try and catch thieves in the act

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: More true crimes, including a house burglar who met his match at the foot of the stairs and a man broke into a garage and ended up having an early bath - in engine oil

Plus, the Second World War veteran who faced a new battle when his home became a crime scene

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A couple on holiday are horrified when their phone shows footage of a burglar on the prowl back home and men stealing cheese from a factory are caught in a trap

programme.desc: A 100-year-old man falls victim to a light-fingered carer and a shopkeeper is stunned when one of his regular customers suddenly turns into an armed robber

programme.desc: The story of serial killer Geoffrey Evans and his accomplice John Shaw, who hit headlines in 1976 after the murders of two women in Ireland

programme.desc: After a grandmother is strangled to death at an allotment shed, police use the scenes forensics clues to solve a chilling case

programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. They take on the US Navy UAP videos - the Tic-Tac footage, filmed from the USS Nimitz in 2004 off San-Diego, and the Go-Fast and Gimbal videos filmed between 2014 and 2015 off the East Coast in the Atlantic from the USS Theodore Roosevelt

programme.title: Conspiracy Files: Unsealed

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Douglas A-1 Skyraider, an aircraft capable of delivering the payload of a B-17, in a single post war air frame. The many variants of this single-piston engined fighter bomber helped dominate the air-to-ground attack role in Vietnam, earning itself quite a reputation

This series investigates whether the Earth is being mapped by intergalactic forces. Washington State holds the United States highest rates of UFO sightings per capita. With a new report made every 55 hours, why are UFOs choosing to hover here?

He dives on shipwrecks around the British coastline to reveal some of the nations murkiest and best-kept secrets, beginning with the site of Britains most famous wreck - the Mary Rose. Ross is accompanied by dive master Neil Brock and tank expert and safety diver Mark Culwick

Meanwhile in the east of Scotland, a weapons hoard belonging to a wealthy Bronze Age warrior is unearthed

programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Warwick Castle, which started as a motte and bailey fort established by William the Conqueror in 1068 and was transformed into a stone fortress two centuries later by the Beauchamp family. programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to Gwynedd to explore the history of Caernarfon Castle, the building of which began in 1283 on the orders of Edward I. He demonstrates how the castles vast stone walls and strategically designed towers repelled all enemies, even the Welsh national hero Owain Glyndwr, earning itself a truly forbidding reputation, but its military importance faded at the end of the 15th century when Henry Tudor - a Welshman - made his way on to the English throne

programme.title: Greatest Prison Escapes with Billy Hayes
programme.desc: Billy focuses his attentions on the notorious Texas 7, a group of prisoners who escaped from the John B Connally Unit near Kenedy, Texas, in December 2000. They employed strength, wit, disguises and plenty of teamwork to achieve the feat

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the use of trains in transporting millions of prisoners to ghettos and death camps during the Holocaust. The programme retraces how the implementation of Nazi Germanys first anti-Jewish laws coincided with a drive to construct the worlds most extensive rail network, and features contributions from survivors, including a Polish man who worked as a child slave in building the railway, who reveals how he narrowly escaped being transported to Auschwitz by hiding in a cemetery

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stepping into stolen art secrets and uncovering the hidden masterpieces, Altausse mine myths and the obsession behind Hitlers art dream

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, transporting raw materials and finished goods all over the country. Their arrival kick-started the Industrial Revolution, which was to turn Britain into a superpower. The very first water superhighway was the Bridgewater Canal, completed in 1761 to carry coal to Manchester from the mines in Worsley. Here, a team of archaeologists from Salford University roots out this industrial past, working with volunteers to excavate the very coal mine that inspired the creation of the canal

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on expeditions through some of Britains most historic landscapes in search of the richest stories from the nations past. He begins with a 40-mile walk along the Derwent Valley in the Peak District, where the worlds industrial revolution was born. En route he visits the sleepy village of Cromford to find out about the work of entrepreneur Richard Arkwright, and stops off at a 900-year-old stately home that has been used as the location for three Jane Eyre films. Brian Blessed also introduces Tony to the joys - and the significance - of the Cromford canal, before this leg of his journey ends in Derby

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on a 45-mile hike through the countryside of the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the areas rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps him relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. From there, he travels up what used to be secret paths to Hever Castle and finds out how the monarchs reign brought not only huge social, political and industrial change, but also fame and disaster to the women who caught his eye He ends this leg of his journey in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary accessing the world of national security at Australias biggest airports as customs and immigration officers tackle drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Following Australias traffic enforcers as they deal with high-speed chases, defiant hooligans and explosive crashes

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, an African wild dog pack find themselves outnumbered by lions and hyenas, and the pups must learn quickly if the pack is to survive

programme.title: The Island of Giants
programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: The wildlife of New Zealands South Island, a brutal place hemmed in by giant mountains, wild winds and the rough Pacific Ocean. Rare penguins are locked in a daily game of cat and mouse with giant sea lions, which must also battle the elements to survive

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: Winters impact on the deep fjords and tidal lagoons of southwestern New Zealand. As bottlenose dolphins escape the freezing fjords, longfin eels are called back to sea

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: The southeastern coast of New Zealand is where young marine animals become adults. Here, young whales, dolphins and seals strike out on their own adventures for the first time

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: In the wild, having company means protection, while isolation often leads to danger. The documentary reveals how groups of animals work together to fight off threats

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Species that cannot survive in one place and must migrate, following epic flights, sea journeys and road trips that play a key part in the lives of many animals

programme.title: Land of the Far North
programme.desc: Life in the Arctic Circle, where the sun hardly sets in summer. Food is abundant, but animals and plants alike face great challenges such as sleep deprivation, pests and predators

programme.title: Land of the Far North
programme.desc: Cold and darkness dominate the Arctic Circle during winter, but nature copes astonishingly well. This documentary reveals how plants and animals survive these brutal conditions

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: Sharks are among the planets oldest and most highly evolved predators. This documentary follows the people dedicated to learning more about these creatures and their plight

programme.title: Africas Claws and Jaws
programme.desc: The seldom-seen reptiles that lurk in the African shadows. Masters of the underworld, these snakes and lizards have conquered almost every habitat there

programme.title: Europes Amazon
programme.desc: Following a 750km journey down the Drava river, starting with the currents Alpine origins to its delta in the Pannonian Basin

programme.title: Europes Amazon
programme.desc: Diving into the great floodplains that lie along the Drava River, areas that are at risk of intense seasonal flooding, before exploring the wetlands of Kopacki Rit

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: The creatures that live in the oceans darkest depths and the skills they have built over the years, from blind worms who fish to crabs who climb trees and more

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Discover some of the planets strangest animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, and see how these ocean-dwelling creatures ensure mutual survival

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: The bizarre mating rituals of the oceans most peculiar creatures, from bloody battles to super-size litters

programme.title: The Island of Giants
programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: A look at Australias Wild West - The Kimberley - the animals who live there and tracking the quests of those working to protect them

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Hermit Crab
programme.desc: The adventures of a small community of Hermit crabs in Guadeloupe during their migration from the cliffs islands northern cliffs to the beaches in the south

programme.title: The Island of Giants
programme.desc: Exploring how whale sharks drive the culture of Santa Maria, the only European hotspot for these giants and why warming seas may be drawing them in

programme.title: Gangs of Lemur Island
programme.desc: In Madagascars remote Berenty Reserve, battle lines are drawn as two ring-tailed lemur gangs face the mounting challenges of the dry season. In the Ruins Gang, Crystals reign of fear makes life hard for some of her subjects, while her rival gang queen Kati of the Museum Gang has found a good food supply for her crew

programme.title: The Big Dry
programme.desc: Zambias Luangwa Valley endures one of the toughest dry seasons imaginable, but for some animals, the drought brings great opportunity

programme.title: The Big Dry
programme.desc: The dry season in Zambias Luangwa Valley, with wildlife having to cope with extreme temperatures and no rain for seven months

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Dr Marty and the MMR team rush to save a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and an orphaned baby sea otter gets adopted into a new family

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: The rescue team tries to save an otter as Dr Marty battles rough conditions to help an entangled sea lion. At the Rescue Centre, a mischievous seal pup puts himself in danger

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: The MMR team helps a lost sea turtle get back home. A huge sea lion is found shot with a crossbow bolt, and Dr Marty helps a fruit bat cope with old age

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Capuchin Louis makes the most out of being let outside for the first time as he plays a game of hide and sneak with Donna. Slow loris Bruce is given Botox

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison receives footage of a pet Tamarin monkey in need of a home, Bruce the loris gets a check-up and golden-cheeked gibbons Kim and Tien get cosy

programme.title: Great Blue Wild

programme.title: Arabian Inferno
programme.desc: While mammals seem to rule over large parts of the planet, it is an entirely different story in Arabia. This is a land where the reptile is king

programme.title: Land of Primates
programme.desc: The lemurs unique features disguise a cunning mind, and it is no coincidence that these primates thrive all over Madagascar. But how have they done it?

programme.title: Africas Hunters
programme.desc: A young lion who was rejected by its mother has grown to maturity, but now faces a series of fresh challenges

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleagues murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie (2014)
programme.desc: An ordinary man leading a life of blissful ignorance in a city made of the construction toy is mistakenly identified as a chosen one destined to save the universe. He joins a mismatched band of heroes in stopping a plan to fix the world permanently in place. Animated comedy, with the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks, Morgan Freeman and Will Ferrell

programme.title: The Lego Movie 2: The Second Part (2019)
programme.desc: Five years after events of the first film, teenager Finn has rebuilt Bricksburg into a post-apocalyptic wasteland. When Emmet is plagued by a vision of an impending cataclysm, he and Lucy fight to protect their beloved city from invaders. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks and Will Arnett

programme.title: The Lego Ninjago Movie (2017)
programme.desc: Shunned by everyone for being the son of an evil warlord, a teenager seeks to defeat him with the help of his fellow ninjas. Animated adventure, with the voices of Jackie Chan, Dave Franco and Fred Armisen

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Ghostbusters II (1989)
programme.desc: The eccentric spectre-hunters reunite to save New York from a massive river of slime generated by the citizens negativity and nasty thoughts. Meanwhile, the spirit of a 16th-century tyrant tries to return to the land of the living by possessing the body of a toddler. Sequel to the supernatural comedy, starring Bill Murray, Sigourney Weaver, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Rick Moranis and Ernie Hudson

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alans brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber (1994)
programme.desc: Dimwitted Rhode Island limousine driver Lloyd Christmas and his equally vacuous friend Harry Dunne embark on a disaster-fraught cross-country trip to Aspen, where they hope to reunite a briefcase with its female owner. However, the pair are unaware the case contains a $1million ransom they would have been better leaving well alone. Farrelly brothers comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly, Teri Garr and Mike Starr

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd (2003)
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous (2005)
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureaus publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughters wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan, Julie Walters, Colin Firth, Stellan Skarsgard and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again (2018)
programme.desc: Its five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mothers past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective (1994)
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls (1995)
programme.desc: The eccentric pet detective is coaxed out of self-imposed exile in a Buddhist monastery to visit Africa and help search for a sacred white bat. However, his unique investigative talents are tested to the limits as he faces a race against time to find the missing creature and prevent a tribal war. Comedy sequel, starring Jim Carrey, Simon Callow and Bob Gunton

programme.title: Look Whos Talking (1989)
programme.desc: Pregnant Mollie is dumped by her boyfriend, and sets out after the babys birth to find a surrogate father for her infant son Mikey, who comments on proceedings through a wisecracking inner monologue. Mikey is confident the cab driver who helped deliver him is the perfect man for the job - but his mother is less than convinced. Comedy, with John Travolta, Kirstie Alley and the voice of Bruce Willis

programme.title: Look Whos Talking Too (1990)
programme.desc: Wisecracking toddler Mikey is joined by mischievous baby sister Julie and sibling rivalry inevitably erupts - while their parents have problems of their own to deal with, in the shape of the kids good-for-nothing uncle. Comedy sequel, starring John Travolta and Kirstie Alley, with the voices of Bruce Willis and Rosanne Barr

programme.title: Look Whos Talking Now (1993)
programme.desc: A family takes in two pet dogs, a scruffy mongrel with discipline problems and a prim and proper pedigree poodle, whose personality clashes create all sorts of mayhem for the household. Comedy sequel, starring John Travolta and Kirstie Alley, plus the voices of Diane Keaton and Danny DeVito as the canine duo

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Part one of two. Nick tries to find a cure for Juliette, while dealing with the revelation that his mother is not dead. Meanwhile, a horrifying creature stalks its prey

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When businessman Arthur Jarvis finds himself in financial difficulty, he approaches his wealthy mother-in-law for financial assistance. She refuses, and shortly afterwards is murdered. When Nick and Hank investigate the case, they discover the culprit to be a bat-like monster, and reveal a marriage bearing eerie similarities to the Cinderella story

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank and Nick investigate an attack on a farmers horses which puts them on the trail of the legendary Bigfoot

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: The latest case offers Nick the chance to discover how his parents were murdered as Hank tries to come to terms with the existence of the supernatural

programme.title: Reginald the Vampire
programme.desc: A womans world is turned upside down when a devastating event occurs, forcing her to confront harsh realities and embark on a journey of self-discovery

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: To mark the shows 100th edition, Yvette Fielding and the team return to Michelham Priory, East Sussex, where they filmed the first episode of Most Haunted. She spends the night at the former Augustine Priory, before David Wells and guest psychic Ian Shillito join the team for a vigil

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon makes plans to take Tracey and Dorien on a madcap 1970s-themed weekender, but Tracey is about to receive some eye-opening news that could spoil her fun. First of a two-part episode of the comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: As Tracey awaits the results of her scan, she and Sharon swap home truths in the comfort of a spa, and try to make plans for the future, while Dorien prepares to say a long goodbye to her daughter Naomi. programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: As the comedy returns, theres bad news for the Stubbs family as they hear that Traceys ex-husband has died and she has to decide what kind of send-off to give him. Linda Robson, Pauline Quirke and Lesley Joseph star, with appearances from Spandau Ballets Martin Kemp and one-time EastEnder Jamie Foreman (Derek Branning)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Birds of a Feather

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: A couple of the birds are forced to fly this week when one of them becomes fed up of being treated like a doormat. The pair of them are soon holed up together in Sharons old bedsit, where they decide to take a united stand - but things are never quite that straightforward. programme.sub-title: Tonight Ill Be Staying Here with You

Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph, with a guest appearance from Kate Williams (Love Thy Neighbour)

programme.title: Mike and Molly

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The autumn sales are over and preparations are being made for winter. In Newtonmore in Cairngorms National Park, Robert MacKenzie needs to gather in all his cows back down to the croft for pregnancy testing, while on North Uist, the MacDonalds are harvesting potatoes grown in the sandy machair soil unique to the west of Scotland

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The Barclays are finding their feet with their new business, which involves buying lambs to fatten up for the butcher. Rachel and Camy, who are one year into their tenancy, set off to market at Lairg to buy more ewes, while Nikki and Ollie find out if their favourite buffalo is pregnant

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The MacDonalds walk their 150 pregnant Highland cattle from the mainland of North Uist to the tidal island of Vallay, which is accessible by foot for only a six-hour window. In the Cairngorms National Park, Jenni is planning for the year ahead with her fledgling alpaca-trekking business, and has decided a trio of pygmy goats is the perfect addition to the menagerie

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: In North Uist, Fraser and Carianne set off for the mainland to sell their rams and buy new ones ready for mating season. They dont always agree on which is best, and the best dont always prove their worth. The Barclays of South Ayrshire prepare their sheep for the Lanark Winter Show, while Nikki and Ollie begin their latest venture - farming rabbits to sell to a local hotel restaurant

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh comes to the aid of the Costellos in Norwich, who have recently moved into a bungalow with a garden in desperate need of a makeover. In 2009, dad Ian was injured by a roadside bomb while serving in Afghanistan, and has since been rehoused with wife Lyndsey and their three children to a property offered specifically to ex-service people and their families. The team aims to provide areas of relaxation, beauty and play, with David Domoney finding a way to stimulate the kids imagination on a budget

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories

In Chinatown, he is entranced by the art of making dim sum and in west London he witnesses the magic of mozzarella making. DJ Stuart Maconie, whos written a book on the Full English, tells Rick about the hilarious variations hes had of our favourite breakfast. At home, Rick cooks beef chow mein

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Documentary following life at Highclere Castle, best known to Downton Abbey fans as the setting for the popular period drama, following Lord and Lady Carnarvon and their loyal staff as they strive to make this year the most profitable to date, with a busy calendar of events both home and away. Lady Carnarvon becomes an unexpected tour guide for some Americans whove turned up expecting a private tour of the famous castle. Head butler Luis mans the drinks and ice-cream kiosk on one of the hottest days of spring, while head of visitor reception Paul prepares to display a precious family heirloom - a vintage 1936 Rolls-Royce

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Following Nevilles arrest on suspicion of killing David Cartwright, DI Karen Flitcroft from the Department of Policing Standards arrives to investigate. programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore how certain British ingredients make traditional combinations, preparing a pork and apple dish and a pear and Stilton tart. They also find out how Yorkshire pudding was made in the 1700s, and discover it was not originally served with beef

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Heavy D, Nat, John, Linda and the rest of the bidders are in Newcastle-upon-Tyne trying to outbid each other. Not everything is black and white in the north-east city, as savvy bidders gamble on unseen storage units. Feisty new girl Ione clashes with Shaun. Sean Kelly hosts

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: Heavy D, Nat, John, Linda and the rest of the bidders are in Northampton trying to outbid each other. Ione goes head to head with Sam - and who will be left as a bridesmaid when a wedding carriage comes up for grabs? Sean Kelly hosts

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Comedian Steve Coogan joins the team as Jeremy Clarkson drives the Ferrari 575 M and the Aston Martin Vanquish, both of which feature F1-style paddle-shift gearboxes, and the Lotus Esprit takes the Top Gear power test. Plus, how to create a gadget-packed James Bond car on a tight budget

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The motoring show has a taste of luxury as Jeremy Clarkson road-tests Mercedes Maybach, the largest and most lavish limousine in the world, and celebrates the 30th birthday of the car that has carried dictators, directors and despots, the Mercedes S Class. Plus, the Jaguar XJ and the Bentley Arnage T. Jonathan Ross is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The explorer travels from Texas to southern Mexico, meeting a woman who risks her life to take supplies to migrants stranded on the Mexican side of the border in Reynosa, one of the countrys most violent cities, which is dominated by a powerful criminal organisation. He also ventures into the rainforest to explore the Maya city of Yaxchilan, and meets the modern-day descendants of this civilisation, who are increasingly marginalised and treated as second-class citizens

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across Central America, from the Caribbean to the Pacific. Along the way, he goes diving on a coral reef on the coast of Belize, and witnesses a gun battle between park rangers and intruders in Chiquibul National Park. He also discovers how climate change has left Guatemala devastated by famine and drought, reports on measures to curb gang violence in El Salvador, and learns how Costa Rica aims to become the worlds first carbon neutral country by 2021

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob Mortimer returns to his childhood roots in Middlesbrough to fish the River Esk and Tees with his friend and angling mentor Paul Whitehouse. As well as trying to catch the glorious grayling, Bob is also going to try to ignite the joy of Christmas in Paul, who thinks the magic of the season has been long lost to commercialism

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers continue their culinary journey by exploring the history behind some of Britains famous pies, a dish the duo have written a book about. They also find out who ate all the pies on the football pitch

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the popularity of takeaway food in Britain and discuss the various ways that it has evolved over the years. The culinary duo also rustle up some of their favourite dishes

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: The actor is joined by his uncle Matheson Green and nephew Daymon Britton, heading to Rothbury in Northumberland to sample a guided bird-watching walk before setting up camp on a farm that rents out converted horseboxes.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A nationwide investigation begins when Dorset police uncover an international gang posing as couriers to scam vulnerable pensioners out of thousands of pounds

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Arson leads to a gunfight as Merseyside Police respond to a pair of attacks on the Wirral that lead to a gang member being hunted

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Jo Brand guest hosts, with panellists radio and TV presenter Rylan and journalist Robert Peston joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop as they delve into the news

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig asks questions on the theme of radio activity, with Joe Lycett, Shazia Mirza, Josh Widdicombe and Alan Davies trying to come up with interesting answers - while avoiding the most obvious ones

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Topical comedy show, with Rob Beckett, Ed Byrne, Milton Jones, Romesh Ranganathan and Holly Walsh joining Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis to take a comic look at recent world events, through stand-up and improvised games. First shown in October 2015

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain presents a special compilation show featuring previously unbroadcast material, out-takes and favourite bits from the recent series of the satirical comedy quiz, when regular panellists Andy Parsons and Hugh Dennis were joined by guests including Rob Beckett, Miles Jupp, Romesh Ranganathan, Ed Byrne and Sara Pascoe

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Guest panellists Jack Dee, Romesh Ranganathan, Gaby Roslin and Tinchy Stryder join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy show in which participants attempt to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Extended edition of the comedy panel game, with Sue Perkins, Ross Noble and David Mitchell joining regular panellist Alan Davies. Host Stephen Fry asks a range of fiendish questions on the topic of knits, knots and other things starting with the letter K, with points being awarded for interesting answers as well as correct ones

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: A sleep-deprived Moira worries about a stack of old love letters addressed to Johnny from another woman. David and Stevie are the victims of a hold-up at the shop

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Johnny hatch a plan to impress an influential travel blogger who might be able to review the motel. David and Patrick search for a new apartment. Eugene Levy stars

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Johnny finds himself under financial pressure, partly due to the arrival of an expensive gown that Moira intends to wear on the red carpet at the premiere of her new movie

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Patrick is hosting a housewarming party he is planning without Davids help, the latter who expects it to fail because of it. Meanwhile, Jocelyn and Roland ask almost everyone in town but Jonny and Moira if they would be willing to babysit

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore how Britains love of cheese has evolved over centuries, travelling to Scotland to sample some of its finest varieties and discovering that the original cheesecake recipes were not American but British

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Gwent Police stumble upon a multi-million-pound drug operation which takes an unexpected turn when detectives unravel a cryptocurrency money laundering scheme

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: A mysterious series of vehicle fires break out across Bristol as fire crews battle 40 blazes - elsewhere, police in Durham examine a dangerous flat fire

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A maintenance team attempts to overhaul a finicky gearbox while another team must shunt an electric passenger train across multiple rail crossings during peak hour

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Ricks journey draws to a close as he heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, where dishes like Papadzules and Sikil Pak are enjoyed in villages across the countryside. Here, locals feast on the hottest chilli of them all, the Habanero. Rick ends his journey feasting on grilled seafood in Tulum, along the shores of the Caribbean Sea

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers find a suspicious compartment within the trailer of a truck returning to Texas, and a man hides over 300 cheap forms of medication about his person in Progreso

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A pedestrian is caught at Hidalgo Bridge smuggling narcotics in bags of coffee, and a nervous woman in Progreso is taken for a pat down

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The racing fan sets out to break the record for the worlds fastest gravity-powered sled, taking expert advice from Winter Olympic gold medallist Amy Williams. Guy experiences his first taste of going blisteringly fast on ice at the famous Cresta Run in the Swiss ski resort of St Moritz, before a crack team of engineers helps him build a prototype toboggan. Then its on to Andorra in the Pyrenees, where he hopes to steer himself into the record books on the new speed ski slope Pista Riberal

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May immerse themselves in nostalgia and try to prove that hot hatches from their younger days are better than their modern equivalents. Jeremy grabs the keys to a Volkswagen Golf GTI, Richard takes the wheel of a Vauxhall Nova SRi and James May opts for the Ford Fiesta XR2i, and the trio set off on a road trip that includes a hill climb and a visit to a supermarket. However, their adventure concludes at an army training ground in Wales, where they and their steeds must face the heavily armed Top Gear Police Department. Downton Abbey star Hugh Bonneville blasts the Reasonably Priced Car around the test track

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond gets behind the wheel of the mid-engined Alfa Romeo 4C on the shores of Lake Como in Italy - but his enjoyment of the lightweight vehicle is disturbed by the arrival of Jeremy Clarkson, who demands a race against his quad bike. Jeremy also visits Belgium, putting the McLaren P1 hypercar to the test in Bruges and around the Spa-Francorchamps Formula One circuit - and its combined power output of more than 900bhp generated from electricity and turbocharged petrol V8 power is likely to cause astonishment. Meanwhile, James May spends time at Camp Bastion in Afghanistan to learn about the armys vehicle redeployment efforts, and actor Tom Hiddleston tries to coax the best time he can muster from the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to create a dinner for two that is fit for a king, but doesnt cost the earth. They receive presentation tips from Michelin-starred chef Olivier Limousin and delve into Britains rich history for cut-price culinary inspiration. Everything they learn is put to the test when they help single mother Paula say a big thank-you to her supportive parents

programme.desc: The comedian dissects the weeks news using stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction. In order to assist in his quest, he calls on the help of regular contributor Sara Pascoe and a variety of other guests, including fellow comics and experts

programme.desc: Documentary series following the investigations of unique specialist units within UK police forces created to crack tough cases ranging from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder.
